query: SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.releaseNoteId = rn.id WHERE rn.id IN (30001, 30002) GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active ORDER BY rn.id ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.releaseNoteId = rn.id WHERE rn.id IN (30001, 30002) GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.summary, rn.body, rn.versionLabel, rn.category, rn.active ORDER BY rn.id ASC;

rows.title: App polish
rows.summary: Swipe navigation and a cleaner Board are live.
rows.body: Swipe between sections, open boost tokens only when needed, and read the mobile top three more easily. Please tap to acknowledge.

rows.title: Proof update
rows.summary: Proof is easier to browse and respond to.
rows.body: Proof posts are easier to browse, reactions and comments are live, and Deep Thought now shows the right interpretation. Please tap to acknowledge.
